query: SELECT SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_facturado, COUNT(*) as project_count FROM projects WHERE dataOrigin = 'manual' AND deletedAt IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT SUM(CAST(totalAmount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_facturado, COUNT(*) as project_count FROM projects WHERE dataOrigin = 'manual' AND deletedAt IS NULL;
